title: Void-Salt Craving
text: You can taste safe routes in the ash, but the taste asks to be fed.
flavor: The salt gathers under your fingernails after every dream.
trigger: Before you reroll or alter a movement result.
penalty: Gain 1 Heat or take 1 wound to keep the reroll.
relief: Spend 1 trophy before rolling movement to ignore this scar for the turn.
upside: If the reroll reaches a safer tier or avoids a threat, gain 1 note.
